hero.subtitle: 15 years of expertise. Consultant in Digital Transformation, Artificial Intelligence and Cybersecurity, I design resilient technological ecosystems for ambitious companies.

vision.title: A technological
vision.p1: Entrepreneur of Congolese origin settled in Marrakech, I act as an innovation player between Central Africa and the Maghreb. With over 15 years of experience, I deploy a pan-African technological vision that connects the DRC and Morocco to markets such as Senegal, Gabon, and South Africa.
vision.p2: My multidisciplinary background, combining fundamental sciences with ICT engineering, allows me to design complete ecosystems. Through Shabaka InnovLab and MOA Digital Agency, I support companies in their 360° digital transformation, from automation to home automation integration.
vision.p3: Today, my mission is deployed through digital hygiene awareness (LaCyberConfiance) and research in Artificial Intelligence (Shabaka InnovLab). A commitment to building strong and resilient technological sovereignty.
vision.direction_360_desc: Shabaka InnovLab and MOA Digital Agency

expertise.title: Areas of
expertise.subtitle: Complete solutions ranging from infrastructure securing to the creation of autonomous agents, including interface design.
expertise.ai_data_desc: Integration of LLM models, design of RAG architectures and development of autonomous AI agents. Optimization of business processes via No-Code automations and Python algorithms. Decision making based on metrics (Data-driven).
expertise.cyber_cloud_desc: Security audits, digital hygiene in business, OSINT (open source intelligence) and mastery of cloud infrastructures.
expertise.fullstack_design_desc: Web/mobile architecture, visual identity, UI/UX, e-commerce platforms and 3D visualization.
expertise.strategy_desc: ICT project management, home automation integration, SEO, Google Search Console, and B2B prospection. Agency direction (MOA), support for startups in incubators and training.

vade_mecum.title: The digital security guide
vade_mecum.description: An essential and practical guide designed to demystify digital hygiene. Through this book, I share concrete strategies and security protocols to protect the digital assets of businesses and individuals from modern threats.
vade_mecum.point_2: Implementation of good digital hygiene practices.

experiences.title: Course &
experiences.cyber_desc: Management of the awareness platform. Creation of the LaCyberConfiance Vademecum, carrying out cyber audits and R&D of AI tools for threat detection.
experiences.rd_desc: Co-management of a tech incubator, design of NICT solutions and development of internal automation tools powered by Artificial Intelligence.
experiences.ai_desc: Development and supervision of the automation of internal and external processes. Optimization of productivity via no-code solutions and AI agents.
experiences.strategy_desc: Operations management and 360° strategies. Home automation integration and digital development for various clients (Al Destino, Yono Group, Na'Palais). Projects nominated at COPA Kinshasa.
experiences.it_desc: Maintenance of IT infrastructures, cybersecurity, video surveillance and complete management of the web platform. Development of social media strategies and product photography.
experiences.sales_desc: Implementation of marketing strategies, active commercial prospecting and technical support for residential home automation solutions.
experiences.impact_desc: Development of high community impact platforms such as “I need help” and “Escape with Locals”. Commitment to training and supporting youth (Injaz Al Maghrib Certification - Steer Your Career).

cta.desc: Whether it is integrating Artificial Intelligence, securing your infrastructures, ensuring the overall management of your project or developing 360° visibility, let's team up to create a tailor-made, resilient and innovative solution.

realisations.title: Achievements &
realisations.desc: A selection of platforms, ecosystems and applications developed or managed across Africa and the world.
